title: Choose the Right Realtime Protocol in 30 Minutes
meta_description: Pick the right realtime protocol in 5 minutes — latency, cost, and browser support compared for WebSocket, SSE, and long polling (2026 data).
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSocket because “it’s realtime,” then burn 7× more on ELB and keep-alives.

SSE is often cheaper and simpler.

Here is the 2026 breakdown 👇
